text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Don't be. Thank you for trying your best for my
sisters!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That said... you're not the sort to throw in the
towel. I'm sure you'll be trying again before long,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You'll win one next time, I just know it!
